description: JSON object merged by repeated global --json (or stdin with --json "-"). Keys must be long flag names for the subcommand you run, plus the reserved key "model" for the model path when MODEL_PATH is omitted. CLI flags override --json. Values may be JSON strings, numbers, booleans, or null (see per-flag types). Pick the oneOf branch whose title matches your command invocation. Branches with identical flag sets are merged in the title. The repository schema is generated with -tags=pkcs11 (see Makefile) so PKCS#11 flags are included.

model.description: Model path when MODEL_PATH is not passed as a positional argument (positional wins if both are set).

allow-symlinks.description: Whether to allow following symlinks when signing or verifying files.

certificate-chain.description: File paths of certificate chain of trust (can be repeated or comma-separated). For --json, pass a single string (e.g. comma-separated paths as for the CLI flag).

ignore-git-paths.description: Ignore git-related files when signing or verifying. [default: true]

ignore-paths.description: File paths to ignore when signing or verifying. For --json, pass a single string (e.g. comma-separated paths as for the CLI flag).

log-format.description: set the log output format (text, json)

log-level.description: set the minimum log level (debug, info, warn, error, silent)
